title: Arctic & Boreal Land Cover Change
description: Mapping and quantifying land cover change across the Arctic and Boreal region of North America using satellite remote sensing and machine learning. Includes biophysical impact analysis using CLM and WRF models.

title: Dryland Vegetation Classification — LiDAR + Hyperspectral
description: Regional-scale classification of dryland vegetation in the northern Great Basin using an integrated LiDAR and hyperspectral approach. Airborne data were combined with machine learning classifiers to map plant functional types.

title: Interactive Map — Example
description: An example of an embedded interactive Leaflet map. Replace the 'embed' field with a URL to your hosted map (e.g., a GitHub Pages map, Google Earth Engine app, or ArcGIS Online app).
